description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:stable Docker image for all jobs and defines two stages: test and deploy. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs apt-get update -q, installs python3-pip python3-pyqt5 python3-h5py python3-scipy python3-psutil python3-numpy python3-matplotlib, then installs python3-sphinx python3-sphinx-rtd-theme build-essential xvfb, runs pip3 install ., changes to the doc directory, executes xvfb-run -a python3 images/make_debug_process_class_image.py, runs make html, returns to the root, moves doc/_build/html to a public folder, publishes the public folder as an artifact, and only runs on the release branch. Also in the deploy stage add a pages_development job that performs the same steps but moves the built HTML to a pages_development folder, publishes that folder as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch. In the test stage add a run_test_docstrings_and_unit_tests job that runs apt-get update -q, installs python3-matplotlib python3-numpy python3-pyqt5 python3-scipy python3-h5py python3-psutil python3-pip, installs python3-pytest python3-pytest-cov xvfb, runs pip3 install ., then executes xvfb-run python3 -m pytest --doctest-modules --cov=fpd_live_imaging fpd_live_imaging/. Add a style_checks job that allows failure, runs apt-get update -q, installs python3-flake8, and runs python3 -m flake8 fpd_live_imaging/. Finally, add a test_documentation job that runs apt-get update -q, installs python3-matplotlib python3-numpy python3-pyqt5 python3-scipy python3-h5py python3-psutil python3-pip, installs python3-pytest xvfb, runs pip3 install ., and runs xvfb-run python3 -m pytest --doctest-glob='*.rst' doc/. No caches or additional artifacts are defined beyond those specified.
